summary: AI that gets you *and* the people in your life, together Discussion | Link
content: Genie was built on the belief that to truly "get" you, a meaningful social product must also "get" the people in your life. Introducing Genie Mentions: the first AI that treats your circle as part of who you are. Your taste. Your friends' taste. What you're all into. Genie keeps track to update you on big moves your friends are making, trips they’re taking, dreams they’re conjuring. If you want AI for work, ChatGPT awaits you; if you want to know what's going on in your world, tag Genie in.
chineseSummary: 人工智能可以让你*和*你生活中的人在一起 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: Genie 的信念是：要真正“吸引”您，有意义的社交产品还必须“吸引”您生活中的人。 Genie Mentions 简介：第一个将你的圈子视为你的一部分的人工智能。你的品味。你朋友的品味。你们都喜欢什么。 Genie 会持续跟踪您朋友的重大举动、旅行以及梦想的最新动态。如果你想要人工智能来工作，ChatGPT 正等着你；如果你想知道你的世界正在发生什么，请标记精灵。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
